characters.name: 晏南枝
characters.appearance: 18岁人族旧帝国皇室旁支，黑发红线、冷灰/雾紫流亡外袍、隐藏月白玉片与血牒；逃亡中仍保持挺直礼法姿态。
characters.wardrobe: Human imperial remnant, black hair tied with a red thread, cold grey or mist-purple fugitive robe, hidden moon-white jade and blood record; upright ritual posture even while fleeing.

characters.name: 罗青禾
characters.appearance: 残阳坳医者，青布头巾、草药绿围裙、土褐药屋上衣、小铜剪、药线；火场中保留医者镇定。
characters.wardrobe: Canyangao healer with blue cloth headscarf, herb-green apron, earth-brown medicine-house blouse, small copper scissors and medicine thread; composed even in fire.

characters.name: 沈照眠
characters.appearance: 沈维桑妹妹，村中浅灰短襦、草药袋、烧焦发绳；清明院状态为白色儿童袍与虫蜡识别环。
characters.wardrobe: Shen Weisang's younger sister, light grey child robe, herb pouch and scorched hair tie; Qingming Court state uses a white child robe and insect-wax recognition ring.

characters.name: 奴兵
characters.appearance: 混血奴兵，扣腕、缚网、押车与抓捕动作清楚；后脑低位金钱马尾式辫发是制度役使标记。
characters.wardrobe: Hybrid slave soldier used for wrist-locking, nets, carts and arrests; low rear queue marks institutional servitude.

characters.name: 沈维桑
characters.appearance: 17岁人族猎户兼旧驿后裔，灰褐猎衣、草药青内层、旧皮护腕、猎弓、短刀、路线包；左肩旧伤必须持续可见。
characters.wardrobe: Grey-brown hunter clothing, herb-green inner layer, old leather wrist guards, bow, short knife and route pack; his injured left shoulder remains visible and limiting.

characters.name: 白翳
characters.appearance: 肃明清明院高阶监察官，两米以上高瘦虫族，虫蜡白官服、高筒官帽、黑日小徽、虫蜡针、清明白册。
characters.wardrobe: Tall thin Qingming Court inspector, insect-wax white official robes, high official hat, black-sun badge, insect-wax needle and Qingming white register.

characters.name: 白册官吏
characters.appearance: 肃明基层官吏，高帽、白册、虫蜡封签、黑日小牌，负责开册下令而非亲自肉搏。
characters.wardrobe: Suming lower official with high hat, white register, insect-wax seals and black-sun plaque; commands through records rather than brawling.

characters.name: 虫族小兵
characters.appearance: 纯虫族小兵，负责封锁退路和外圈压阵，暗绿甲壳与军阶牌要和官吏/奴兵区分。
characters.wardrobe: Pure insect infantry sealing exits and holding the perimeter, dark green carapace and rank plates distinct from clerks and slave soldiers.

locations.name: 药屋地窖
locations.spatial_layout: 罗青禾药屋下方低矮暗格，火光从地窖门灌入，药柜与暗格必须同源。

locations.name: 残阳坳村口
locations.spatial_layout: 村口检查桌、旧井、封门牌、押车和药屋侧墙形成火线空间。

locations.name: 药屋火场
locations.spatial_layout: 药柜、后窗、水缸、地窖口和坠落木梁构成可控火场。

locations.name: 押车路口
locations.spatial_layout: 柴垛、押车路、第二辆车和清明香车轮声连接追妹妹线。

locations.name: 后山坡
locations.spatial_layout: 后山坡俯看火后的残阳坳，旧水沟通向逃亡路线。

props.name: 月白玉片
props.description: 晏南枝隐藏身份的月白玉片，火光或旧驿反应中显出日月纹。
props.description_en: moon-white jade piece that exposes Yan Nanzhi's identity when firelight or relay-stone reaction reveals sun-moon markings

props.name: 押车
props.description: 缚网押车与铜环声，连接沈照眠失踪、外署换名和追捕线。
props.description_en: prison cart with binding net and copper rings, linking Shen Zhaomian's capture to the outer office

props.name: 清明白册
props.description: 清明院用于验名、追踪、错册和抹名的白册。
props.description_en: Qingming white register used for name testing, tracking, false entries and erasure

props.name: 虫蜡针
props.description: 白翳与清明院执行验名、审讯和追踪的虫蜡针。
props.description_en: insect-wax needle used by Bai Yi and the Qingming Court for identity testing and interrogation

props.name: 虫蜡封条
props.description: 肃明制度空间的封门和抹名符号。
props.description_en: insect-wax seals used for institutional closure and erasure

props.name: 日月血牒
props.description: 油纸包裹的残缺血牒，不可展开成万能圣物；它会引发追踪风险。
props.description_en: oil-paper wrapped damaged blood record; not a magic solution, and it carries tracking risk

props.name: 清明香
props.description: 灰白清明香追踪气味，贴血、旧蜡或血牒反应。
props.description_en: grey-white Qingming incense tracking scent that clings to blood, old wax or the blood record

props.name: 烧焦发绳
props.description: 沈照眠亲情锚点，必须在追妹妹线保持连续。
props.description_en: scorched hair tie as Shen Zhaomian family anchor

props.name: 半枚日月驿令
props.description: 半枚日月驿令，只能触发断续旧驿残纹，不能完整开路或替代判断。
props.description_en: half sun-moon relay token that only triggers broken old-route lines and cannot replace judgment

continuity_rules: 沈维桑左肩旧伤、猎户动作和有限旧驿共鸣必须按剧本代价呈现，不能升级成无代价法术。
晏南枝血牒和月白玉片只在剧本指定压力中暴露，逃亡装保持遮蔽但不削弱气度。
肃明层级必须区分白册官吏、奴兵、虫族小兵、白翳/甲军府，不混成同一种敌人。
金赤只属于旧驿、日月纹、盟书和残页；虫蜡白/骨白属于清明院制度空间；边墙雪线保持黑石、冰青、旧铁和干血暗红。
所有动作按真实重心和真实接触反作用生成，避免摆拍、漂浮慢动作和无因果奇观。
